description:
You are a data-scientist who has just received a raw, tab-separated value (TSV) file that contains more columns than you need.  
Your goal is to:

1. Extract only the first four columns (Region, Product, Q1, Q2) from the existing file  
   /home/user/datasets/raw_sales.tsv

2. Write the result to a new file  
   /home/user/datasets/trimmed_sales.tsv

3. Produce a very small log that records this action.  
   Create the file  
   /home/user/datasets/processing.log  
   with exactly one line of plain text:

   columns 1-4 extracted from raw_sales.tsv to trimmed_sales.tsv

   • There must be **no** extra spaces before/after the line.  
   • The file must end with a single trailing newline character.

Important details that the automatic grader will check:

• Use a single terminal command that relies on standard Unix text-processing utilities (for example, “cut”).  
• Do not modify the order of the remaining columns or their data.  
• Preserve the original header row.  
• The output file must be tab-separated, exactly mirroring the delimiters used in the source file.  
• The final /home/user/datasets/trimmed_sales.tsv must therefore contain five rows total:  
  – the header row, then four data rows.  
• Make sure that both /home/user/datasets/trimmed_sales.tsv and /home/user/datasets/processing.log are created in the specified directory and contain precisely what is required; otherwise the automated tests will fail.

You do not need to write explanatory text to the console—only run the necessary command(s) so that the two files appear with the exact contents described above.
truth:
Pre-existing data (placed in the image before the task starts):

File: /home/user/datasets/raw_sales.tsv  
(tab-separated; ↹ shown for clarity)  
Region↹Product↹Q1↹Q2↹Q3↹Q4↹Notes  
North↹Widget↹1200↹1300↹1400↹1500↹High demand  
South↹Gadget↹900↹950↹970↹980↹Backordered  
East↹Widget↹1100↹1150↹1200↹1250↹Stable  
West↹Gadget↹1000↹1020↹1040↹1050↹Promotion planned  

Expected file after successful task:

File: /home/user/datasets/trimmed_sales.tsv  
Region↹Product↹Q1↹Q2  
North↹Widget↹1200↹1300  
South↹Gadget↹900↹950  
East↹Widget↹1100↹1150  
West↹Gadget↹1000↹1020  

(Expected to be terminated with a single newline)

Log file after successful task:

File: /home/user/datasets/processing.log  
columns 1-4 extracted from raw_sales.tsv to trimmed_sales.tsv  

(Expected to be terminated with a single newline)
